/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC  -Wl,--no-undefined -shared -Wl,-soname,libmy_robot_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.so -o libmy_robot_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.so CMakeFiles/my_robot_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/my_robot_interfaces/srv/feature_detection__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/user/ros2_ws/build/my_robot_interfaces:/home/simulations/ros2_sims_ws/install/geometry_msgs/lib:/home/simulations/ros2_sims_ws/install/std_msgs/lib:/home/simulations/ros2_sims_ws/install/builtin_interfaces/lib:/opt/ros/humble/lib: libmy_robot_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /home/simulations/ros2_sims_ws/install/geometry_msgs/lib/libgeometry_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /home/simulations/ros2_sims_ws/install/std_msgs/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /home/simulations/ros2_sims_ws/install/geometry_msgs/lib/libgeometry_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /home/simulations/ros2_sims_ws/install/std_msgs/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /home/simulations/ros2_sims_ws/install/builtin_interfaces/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /home/simulations/ros2_sims_ws/install/builtin_interfaces/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/humble/lib
